name: Cinnamon Hearts (Kh)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour and sugar in a bowl.
2. Cut butter into the mixture on a pastry board until combined.
3. Add egg yolks and work the dough together quickly.
4. Place the dough in the refrigerator for about 30 minutes.
5. Roll out the dough and use a cookie cutter to cut out heart shapes.
6. Brush the hearts with lightly whipped egg white.
7. Dip the cakes in a mixture of sugar and cinnamon.
8. Bake at 325°F (163°C) for 10 to 12 minutes.
